OIL-BASED                                                                                                                                                                                                    56.000


                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     The 1 x 28MW TM2500 Gas Turbine Generator for Phase 2 has been
Sangali Diesel Power Plant Phase 1                            Oil                          Malita Power Inc.                         Brgy. Sangali, Zamboanga City         Zamboanga del Sur      IX         28.000              Mar-26               Apr-26
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     recommended by GE last Sept. 26, 2023, to undergo Turbine Engine repair in
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     their shop (Italy) to replace the bearings, some components and other affected
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     parts due to the water ingress from the stack brought by the typhoon. Tentative
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     arrival at site of the repaired TM 2500 engine from GE depot in Italy is by July
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     2025.

Notes:
TBD - To be determined
Renewable Energy (RE) Projects (Geothermal, Hydro, Biomass, Solar, and Wind) are updated as of 31 December 2025
IRESS - Integrated Renewable Energy and Energy Storage System

For inquiries, please contact the following:
DOE Electric Power Industry Management Bureau (EPIMB) for non-RE projects (coal, oil, natural gas,and BESS) - doe.epimb.powerprojects@gmail.com
DOE Renewable Energy Management Bureau (REMB) for RE Projects - remb9513@doe.gov.ph
